name: Mexican Rarebit
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Canned tomatoes, drained and chopped
1 lb Sharp Cheddar or Monterey Jack cheese, or a combination of both
recipeInstructions:
Mexican Rarebit
Sliced pimento Minced parsley
In the top of a double boiler, sauté green pepper in butter until tender. Place over hot water and add tomatoes, corn, chilies, salt, and cheese. Stir until well-blended and cheese is melted. Blend in crumbs and egg. Cook and stir until mixture is thickened. Put in a chafing dish, garnish with sliced pimento and minced parsley.
